name: memoryai-coding-guard
description: Anti-sloppy enforcement hooks. Block dangerous ops, force verify before done, quote rationalizations, detect red flags.

PreToolUse.description: Block rm -rf, git push --force, --no-verify, DROP TABLE without explicit confirm.

PostToolUse.description: After edits: detect project type, run lint/typecheck on changed files. Re-inject errors.
Scan changed content for observable anti-patterns from constitution red_flags.

Stop.description: Block 'task done' if code touched but verify never ran green with evidence (exit_code + tail:20).

UserPromptSubmit.description: When user message matches a known rationalization, quote the truth back.
